title: Pinned recipe and product planned nutrition summaries
summary: Recipe Meal의 pin된 recipe snapshot과 ProductPlannerEntry의 pin된 product version만 최대 7일 range/day/column 계획 영양으로 합산하고, PLANNER_WEEK compact 열량과 MEAL_SCREEN 핵심 5종 상세에서 partial/unavailable/quality를 보존한다.
goal: 사용자가 기존 Recipe Meal과 완제품 계획을 과거 pin 기준으로 재현 가능한 끼니·날짜·주간 계획 영양으로 확인하되 결측을 0이나 실제 섭취로 오해하지 않게 한다.

owners.claude: replaced only for the user-approved nutrition/products/planner program; the global stage-owner policy is unchanged
owners.codex: fresh role-separated Codex tasks own Stage 1 docs, independent Stage 1.5 review and repair-final, Stage 2 backend TDD, independent Stage 3 review, Stage 4 frontend, authority precheck, Stage 5 and final authority, and Stage 6; no author or implementer self-approves

dependencies: recipe-nutrition-calculation backend and frontend are merged in origin/master ancestry and provide immutable recipe snapshots plus nullable Meal pins
prepared-food-planner-entry docs backend frontend and closeout are merged through 64d2b5145d1e96772eb7dfee4d4057cafcab8f64 and provide immutable product version pins
nutrition products planner contract is locked in official requirements v1.7.20 screen v1.5.26 flow v1.3.23 database v1.3.21 and API v1.2.25
independent fresh Codex Stage 1.5 approval is required before Stage 2 starts

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/planner-nutrition-aggregate.test.ts tests/planner-nutrition-api.test.ts tests/planner-nutrition-read-model.test.ts tests/planner-route.test.ts tests/meals-route.test.ts tests/prepared-food-planner-entry-read-model.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-snapshot.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run tests/planner-nutrition-ui.test.tsx tests/planner-week-screen.test.tsx tests/planner-meal-screen.test.tsx
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/planner-nutrition-aggregate.test.ts tests/planner-nutrition-api.test.ts tests/planner-nutrition-read-model.test.ts tests/planner-route.test.ts tests/meals-route.test.ts tests/prepared-food-planner-entry-read-model.test.ts tests/recipe-nutrition-snapshot.test.ts
pnpm exec vitest run tests/planner-nutrition-ui.test.tsx tests/planner-week-screen.test.tsx tests/planner-meal-screen.test.tsx

actual_verification_refs: Stage 2 RED: missing aggregate module, undefined read model, missing route module, and missing isolated PostgreSQL runner each failed before implementation
Targeted aggregate/API/read-model plus existing planner/meals/product/snapshot regressions passed 7 files and 45 tests

tests/planner-nutrition-postgres.integration.test.ts via scripts/run-planner-nutrition-postgres-integration.mjs passed 2/2 on isolated non-5432 PostgreSQL 17.10 with real bootstrap, owner A/B, pinned recipe/product aggregates, old-pin stability, source-version separation, bounded reads, zero measured writes, and process/socket/temp cleanup
pnpm verify:backend passed lint with 0 errors and 4 unrelated existing warnings, typecheck, 1550 product tests with 24 intended skips, production build, and security Playwright 12/12
No migration, RPC, dependency, generic preparation/size/edible field, or unapproved endpoint/query/response/status/error surface was added; production/staging/provider writes remain 0
Stage 2 implementation is pending fresh independent Stage 3 exact-head review; Stage 4 UI/browser/authority evidence remains pending

out_of_scope: Actual consumption eaten skipped nutrition goals goal attainment and medical disease coaching
Current recipe snapshot or product version repin backfill or immutable snapshot mutation
Existing GET planner GET meals POST meals or product entry mutation shape changes
New endpoint query response field HTTP status error code workflow status table column index trigger or RPC
Entry-level new missing-reason or partial-unavailable-count API fields
Cooking loss generic preparation size edible fields density relation chaining OCR barcode dining out and meal kit
Production staging external provider writes and secret or raw provider output
notes: Stage 2 backend TDD implementation is complete on feature/be-planner-nutrition-summary after the independent Stage 1.5 docs approval. RED was observed for the absent aggregate module, read model, route, and PostgreSQL runner before implementation. Targeted Vitest passed 7 files/45 tests; isolated non-5432 PostgreSQL 17.10 passed 2/2 with actual bootstrap, pinned recipe/product aggregation, current-switch old-pin stability, source-version separation, owner isolation, bounded reads, zero measured writes, and cleanup; pnpm verify:backend passed product 1550 with 24 intended skips, production build, and security 12/12. Only the exact read-only GET /planner/nutrition contract was implemented, with no migration/RPC/dependency or generic preparation/size/edible field and zero production/staging/provider writes. closeout_phase=collecting, auto_merge remains false, and this implementer has not approved Stage 3. Fresh independent Stage 3 exact-head review, Stage 4 UI/browser/real-local-DB evidence, authority reviews, and final closeout remain pending.
